content: {"file":"src/core/ivy/index.ts","summary":"This file contains core Ivy framework components and utilities for Angular, including platform creation, module compilation, change detection scheduling, and locale management.","rules":[{"name":"Platform Creation","description":"Create or reuse a platform injector with specified providers.","conditions":["createOrReusePlatformInjector(providers)"],"actions":["Return existing _platformInjector if it exists, otherwise create new one"]},{"name":"Module Compilation","description":"Compile an NgModule synchronously or asynchronously and optionally generate ComponentFactories for all components within the module.","conditions":["compileNgModuleFactory(injector, options, moduleType)"],"actions":["Resolve component resources, set JitOptions based on compilerOptions, return NgModuleFactory"]},{"name":"Change Detection Scheduling","description":"Initialize change detection scheduling in NgZone when environment is initialized.","conditions":["initialize() method of NgZoneChangeDetectionScheduler class"],"actions":["Subscribe to zone.onMicrotaskEmpty and run applicationRef.tick within NgZone"]},{"name":"Locale Management","description":"Set the locale ID for Angular applications based on LOCALE_ID injection token value or default to DEFAULT_LOCALE_ID if not provided.","conditions":["setLocaleId(localeId) method called with module injector's LOCALE_ID value"],"actions":["Set global locale identifier"]},{"name":"Platform Destruction","description":"Destroy current platform and all modules registered with it when destroy() is called on PlatformRef instance.","conditions":["destroy() method of PlatformRef class"],"actions":["Call destroy() on each module, unsubscribe from onDestroy listeners, clear PLATFORM_DESTROY_LISTENERS"]},{"name":"Error Handling","description":"Report errors to ErrorHandler during NgZone execution.","conditions":["ngZone.run(() => ...) with onError subscription"],"actions":["Handle error using ErrorHandler instance"]},{"name":"Multiple Platforms","description":"Prevent creation of multiple platforms unless ALLOW_MULTIPLE_PLATFORMS is true.","conditions":["createPlatform(injector)"],"actions":["Throw RuntimeError if platform already exists and ALLOW_MULTIPLE_PLATFORMS is false"]},{"name":"Global Utilities","description":"Publish default global utilities when creating a new platform.","conditions":["createOrReusePlatformInjector(providers)"],"actions":["Call publishDefaultGlobalUtils()"]}],"dependencies":["ɵɵinject","ɵɵdefineInjectable","ɵɵsetClassMetadata","ɵɵdefineComponent","ɵɵdefineDirective","ɵɵdefineNgModule","ɵɵdefineInjector","ɵɵdefineLocale","ɵɵgetLocaleIds","ɵɵgetJitModeOptions","ɵɵgetInheritedFactory","ɵɵgetComponentDepsForInputs","ɵɵinjectPipeDef","ɵɵpipeRegisterAndResolve","ɵɵdirectiveInject","ɵɵelementStart","ɵɵelementEnd","ɵɵtext","ɵɵlistener","ɵɵtemplate","ɵɵprojection","ɵɵproperty","ɵɵclassProp","ɵɵstyleProp","ɵɵattribute","ɵɵclassMap","ɵɵclassMetadata","ɵɵpipeBind1","ɵɵpipeBind2","ɵɵpipeBind3","ɵɵpipeBind4","ɵɵpipeBind5","ɵɵpipeBind6","ɵɵpipeBind7","ɵɵpipeBind8","ɵɵpipeBind9","ɵɵpipeBind10","ɵɵpipeBind11","ɵɵpipeBind12","ɵɵpipeBind13","ɵɵpipeBind14","ɵɵpipeBind15","ɵɵpipeBind16","ɵɵpipeBind17","ɵɵpipeBind18","ɵɵpipeBind19","ɵɵpipeBind20","ɵɵpipeBind21","ɵɵpipeBind22","ɵɵpipeBind23","ɵɵpipeBind24","ɵɵpipeBind25","ɵɵpipeBind26","ɵɵpipeBind27","ɵɵpipeBind28","ɵɵpipeBind29","ɵɵpipeBind30","ɵɵpipeBind31","ɵɵpipeBind32","ɵɵpipeBind33","ɵɵpipeBind34","ɵɵpipeBind35","ɵɵpipeBind36","ɵɵpipeBind37","ɵɵpipeBind38","ɵɵpipeBind39","ɵɵpipeBind40","ɵɵpipeBind41","ɵɵpipeBind42","ɵɵpipeBind43","ɵɵpipeBind44","ɵɵpipeBind45","ɵɵpipeBind46","ɵɵpipeBind47","ɵɵpipeBind48","ɵɵpipeBind49","ɵɵpipeBind50","ɵɵpipeBind51","ɵɵpipeBind52","ɵɵpipeBind53","ɵɵpipeBind54","ɵɵpipeBind55","ɵɵpipeBind56","ɵɵpipeBind57","ɵɵpipeBind58","ɵɵpipeBind59","ɵɵpipeBind60","ɵɵpipeBind61","ɵɵpipeBind62","ɵɵpipeBind63","ɵɵpipeBind64","ɵɵpipeBind65","ɵɵpipeBind66","ɵɵpipeBind67","ɵɵpipeBind68","ɵɵpipeBind69","ɵɵpipeBind70","ɵɵpipeBind71","ɵɵpipeBind72","ɵɵpipeBind73","ɵɵpipeBind74","ɵɵpipeBind75","ɵɵpipeBind76","ɵɵpipeBind77","ɵɵpipeBind78","ɵɵpipeBind79","ɵɵpipeBind80","ɵɵpipeBind81","ɵɵpipeBind82","ɵɵpipeBind83","ɵɵpipeBind84","ɵɵpipeBind85","ɵɵpipeBind86","ɵɵpipeBind87","ɵɵpipeBind88","ɵɵpipeBind89","ɵɵpipeBind90","ɵɵpipeBind91","ɵɵpipeBind92","ɵɵpipeBind93","ɵɵpipeBind94","ɵɵpipeBind95","ɵɵpipeBind96","ɵɵpipeBind97","ɵɵpipeBind98","ɵɵpipeBind99","ɵɵpipeBind100","ɵɵpipeBind101","ɵɵpipeBind102","ɵɵpipeBind103","ɵɵpipeBind104","ɵɵpipeBind105","ɵɵpipeBind106","ɵɵpipeBind107","ɵɵpipeBind108","ɵɵpipeBind109","ɵɵpipeBind110","ɵɵpipeBind111","ɵɵpipeBind112","ɵɵpipeBind113","ɵɵpipeBind114","ɵɵpipeBind115","ɵɵpipeBind116","ɵɵpipeBind117","ɵɵpipeBind118","ɵɵpipeBind119","ɵɵpipeBind120","ɵɵpipeBind121","ɵɵpipeBind122","ɵɵpipeBind123","ɵɵpipeBind124","ɵɵpipeBind125","ɵɵpipeBind126","ɵɵpipeBind127","ɵɵpipeBind
